verification.current_public_path: The official contact page directs customers to a form and phone line.
verification.gap_hypothesis: Some callers may still abandon when a live answer is unavailable; this requires validation with the owner.

proposed_flow: Immediate text acknowledgment after a missed call
Collect name, address, HVAC category, urgency, and callback window
Create callback task and daily lead summary
draft_subject: Missed-call follow-up idea for Hometown HVAC
draft_text:
Hello,

I reviewed Hometown HVAC's public contact flow. Your site directs customers to a contact form and phone line.

I prepared a short workflow audit for handling callers when the team cannot answer immediately: instant text acknowledgment, basic HVAC intake, callback routing, and a daily lead summary. It works alongside the existing phone process.

May I send the audit?

Regards,
Call Rescue Kit
https://callrescuekit.com
